_meta: VT-95 landing copy. NEEDS-FAZAL: this is honest first-pass copy (Pillar 7 — no inflated metrics, the day-39 refund promise stated plainly). Fazal reviews/finalises every line + the 8 FAQ answers before public go-live. Prices are NOT here — they come from NEXT_PUBLIC_*_PRICE_INR (config), rendered as ₹.
hero.title: Your WhatsApp sales agent for the shop
hero.subtitle: Viabe Team recovers customers you'd have lost, keeps your sales ledger on WhatsApp, and refunds you if it doesn't earn its keep.
value.title: What Viabe Team does
value.1.title: Sales Recovery Agent
value.1.body: It follows up with customers who went quiet — gently, on WhatsApp — so a lapsed regular comes back instead of being forgotten.
value.2.title: WhatsApp ledger
value.2.body: Your sales and customer notes stay in WhatsApp, where you already work. No new app to learn, no spreadsheet to maintain.
value.3.title: Refund if no results
value.3.body: If Viabe Team doesn't bring back at least twice what you paid by day 39, you get a refund. We only win when you do.
pricing.title: Simple monthly pricing
pricing.founding.name: Founding
pricing.founding.tagline: For the first shops who join us
pricing.standard.name: Standard
pricing.pro.name: Pro
pricing.pro.tagline: For busier shops and multiple outlets
day39.title: The day-39 promise
day39.body: By day 39 of your subscription, Viabe Team should have recovered at least 2× what you paid. If it hasn't, reply REFUND and we return your fee — no argument, no fine print. This keeps us honest: we earn only when your shop earns.
faq.title: Questions shop owners ask
faq.a1: NEEDS-FAZAL: a plain-language answer — a WhatsApp agent that follows up with your customers and keeps your sales ledger.
faq.q2: Do I need to install an app?
faq.a2: NEEDS-FAZAL: no — it works inside the WhatsApp you already use.
faq.q3: How does the refund promise work?
faq.a3: NEEDS-FAZAL: by day 39 it should recover 2× your fee; if not, reply REFUND and your fee is returned.
faq.a4: NEEDS-FAZAL: the monthly price for each plan is shown above; no setup fee.
faq.a5: NEEDS-FAZAL: your data stays yours; we follow DPDP and you can export or delete it anytime.
faq.a6: NEEDS-FAZAL: a limited number of early shops get our lowest price for joining first.
faq.a7: NEEDS-FAZAL: yes — cancel whenever you like, no lock-in.
faq.a8: NEEDS-FAZAL: message us on WhatsApp and a person follows up.
